allow: Bash(node -e "const icons = require\('lucide-react'\); const entries = Object.entries\(icons\); console.log\('total:', entries.length\); const sample = entries.slice\(0,3\).map\(\([k,v]\) => \({name: k, type: typeof v, hasDisplay: !!\(v && v.displayName\), proto: v && Object.getPrototypeOf\(v\)?.name}\)\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(sample, null, 2\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const icons = require\('lucide-react'\); const entries = Object.entries\(icons\); const nonIcons = entries.filter\(\([,v]\) => typeof v !== 'object' || !v.displayName\).slice\(0,5\); console.log\('non-icons:', JSON.stringify\(nonIcons.map\(\([k,v]\) => \({k, type: typeof v}\)\)\)\);")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); content=d[0]['text']; obj=json.loads\(content\); lines=obj['content'].split\('\\n'\); print\('\\n'.join\(lines[:80]\)\)")
